rules.title: 📊 Real-Time Profile Performance & Health Score Analysis
rules.summary: Here is a complete live diagnostic of your BlueX provider profile based on Swiss market benchmarks:
defaultActionPoints: 📸 **Upload High-Resolution Profile Photo**: Professional avatars yield a 2.1x higher profile view-to-booking ratio.
📜 **Submit Trade Certification via OCR**: Dynamic document verification instantly grants the green Verified Provider badge (+20% health score boost).
⭐ **Collect Initial Client Reviews**: Providers with at least 5 reviews receive 2.5x higher search ranking in Canton Zurich.
⚡ **Activate Instant Availability**: 64% of Swiss customers filter by immediate availability during business hours.
